description: You are the Clinical Data Manager responsible for closing out the 'Boston Heart Institute' site (CV-BHI-001) for the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry. Using OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), change the status of the 'Boston Heart Institute' site from Available to Locked. Generate the complete Subject Casebooks for subjects CV-BHI-101 and CV-BHI-102, saving them to /home/ga/Documents/CV-BHI-101_Casebook.pdf and /home/ga/Documents/CV-BHI-102_Casebook.pdf respectively. Additionally, export a dataset for the Boston Heart Institute site in CDISC ODM XML format to /home/ga/Documents/BHI_Site_Data.xml.
